title: APIExpose SDK capabilities report
description: Result of APIExposeClient.getCapabilities(): which optional endpoints this APIExpose installation answers right now. Some capabilities are context-dependent: panels and hiscores need a selected or running game, retroachievements needs a configured account.

apiExposeVersion.description: Version reported by /api/v1/health, null when unreachable.

sdkVersion.description: Version of the SDK that produced the report.

endpoints.description: Endpoint name -> reachable (HTTP success) at probe time.
